metadata.name: altscore
metadata.summary: Python SDK for AltScore. It provides a simple interface to the AltScore API.

documentation: this is the id an identifier for the source of the value

functions.name: altscore.macros.validate_inputs._format_pydantic_errors
documentation: Formats Pydantic ValidationError details into a more readable string.

methods.name: altscore.cms.model.credit_accounts.CreditAccountAsync.update
documentation:
Updates credit account with the given amount and currency, and the reason for the update.
It will replace the data in the object with the response from the API.

methods.name: altscore.cms.model.credit_accounts.CreditAccountSync.update
documentation:
Updates credit account with the given amount and currency, and the reason for the update.
It will replace the data in the object with the response from the API.

documentation: Yield successive n-sized chunks from lst.
